standard_questions.motivation: Respond based on the specific job description and company. Mention relevant experience from profile.
standard_questions.describe_project: Choose from: FA Player (streaming app), Roche chat app (healthcare), StreamAMG SDK (media SDK). Pick the most relevant to the job.
standard_questions.experience_with_X: If X is in profile, give detailed answer. If not, say: Eager to learn, experienced with similar technology Y.
standard_questions.why_leaving: My last project has concluded and I'm actively looking for new opportunities to grow as a developer and take on new challenges.
standard_questions.strengths: 10+ years mobile experience, strong remote work skills, adaptable to new technologies, clean code advocate.
standard_questions.weaknesses: Frame positively: I can be overly detail-oriented, which I manage by setting clear priorities and deadlines.
